name: Charls English Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the milk, shortening, salt, and sugar in a large bowl.
2. Cool to lukewarm by adding water, stirring until combined.
3. Dissolve yeast according to package instructions.
4. Add the dissolved yeast to the milk mixture and stir well.
5. Gradually add flour, mixing until a soft dough forms.
6. Place the dough on a floured surface and roll out to 1/4 inch thickness.
7. Cut with a 3 1/2-inch round cutter.
8. Place the cut pieces on a baking sheet sprinkled with 2 tablespoons cornmeal.
9. Sprinkle tops of muffins with additional 2 tablespoons cornmeal.
10. Let rise in a warm place (85-90 degrees) until doubled in size, about 1 hour.
11. Bake slowly on a hot, ungreased griddle until brown, about 7 minutes per side.
12. Split the muffins, toast, and serve with butter and marmalade.
